spell.cantrip.shocking_touch.name: Shocking Touch
spell.cantrip.shocking_touch.description:
[key.flag.electric](Shock) the target you're looking at for [key.variable.positive]({0:N0}) [key.flag.electric] [key.mechanic.damage], jumping to up to [key.variable.positive]({1:N0}) additional nearby targets.
[key.flavour.important](Restores) [key.variable.positive]({2:N1}) [key.stat.magic.mana] [key.trigger.on_hit].
spell.cantrip.ember.name: Ember
spell.cantrip.ember.description:
Shoot a bolt of [key.flag.fire](flame) that deals [key.variable.positive]({0:N0}) [key.flag.fire] [key.mechanic.damage] and applies [key.variable.positive]({1:N0}) [key.status.burn].
[key.flavour.important](Restores) [key.variable.positive]({2:N1}) [key.stat.magic.mana] [key.trigger.on_hit].
spell.cantrip.hailstone.name: Hailstone
spell.cantrip.hailstone.description:
Send out a deadly blade of [key.flag.frost](ice), dealing [key.variable.positive]({0:N0}) [key.flag.frost] [key.mechanic.damage].
This spell can [key.mechanic.critical_hit](Critically Hit) and [key.mechanic.trigger] [key.mechanic.execute](Executions).
[key.flavour.important](Restores) [key.variable.positive]({1:N1}) [key.stat.magic.mana] [key.trigger.on_hit].
